zh.Vitré, Ille-Et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France: 法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷
zh.lifeSummary: 當Aliénor de   Vitre於1158年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷時，她的父親Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré38歲，母親Emma de Dinan22歲。她於大約1184年與William FitzPatrick結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1233年8月在英國素瑞多爾金享年75歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯蒙達也。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aliénor de   Vitre于1158年出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷时，她的父亲Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré38岁，母亲Emma de Dinan22岁。她于大约1184年与William FitzPatrick结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1233年8月在英国素瑞多爾金享年75岁，埋葬在法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯蒙達也。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vitre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hispanic (mainly Mexico and Argentina): adaptation of a surname such as Greek   Mitropoulos   and Italian   Mitri  .
Albanian and Romanian: from the personal name Mitre, a short form of Albanian Dhimitër, Romanian Dumitru, from classical Greek Dēmētrios (see Dimitris ).

variants.name: Mitropoulos
meanings: Greek: patronymic from the personal name Mitros + the ending -poulos (from Latin pullus ‘nestling, chick’), which occurs chiefly in the Peloponnese. Compare Metropoulos .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Aliénor de   Vitre was born in 1158, in Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, her father, Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré, was 38 and her mother, Emma de Dinan, was 22. She married William FitzPatrick about 1184. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in August 1233, in Dorking, Surrey, England, at the age of 75, and was buried in Mondaye, Calvados, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aliénor de   Vitre est née en 1158, à Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Emma de Dinan, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé William FitzPatrick environ 1184. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en août 1233, à Dorking, Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Mondaye, Calvados, Normandie, France.

de.Sutton On Trent, Nottinghamshire, Englan: Sutton on Trent, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Aliénor de   Vitre 1158 in Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré 38 und ihre Mutter Emma de Dinan 22. Sie hat um 1184 William FitzPatrick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im August 1233 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Dorking, Surrey, England und wurde in Mondaye, Calvados, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aliénor de   Vitre è nata il nel 1158 nel Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Emma de Dinan, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato William FitzPatrick circa 1184. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel agosto 1233, nel Dorking, Surrey, England, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolta a Mondaye, Calvados, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Aliénor de   Vitreが1158年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインヴィトルeで生まれた時，父Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitréは38歳，母Emma de Dinanは22歳であった。約1184年にWilliam FitzPatrickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1233年8月にイギリススリードールキングで75歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディカルヴァドスモンデイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Aliénor de   Vitre(이)가 1158년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 비트e에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma de Dinan(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1184년 William FitzPatrick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1233년 8월 영국 수리 도르킨그에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 먼데이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aliénor de   Vitre nasceu em 1158, em Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Dinan, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com William FitzPatrick aproximadamente 1184. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em agosto de 1233, em Dorking, Surrey, Inglaterra, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em Mondaye, Calvados, Normandie, França.

ru.Sutton On Trent, Nottinghamshire, Englan: суттон он трент, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aliénor de   Vitre родилась в 1158 г. в местности витрe, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma de Dinan, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William FitzPatrick около 1184 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла август 1233 г. в местности доркинг, сурри, Англия в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности мондеи, калвадос, норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aliénor de   Vitre nació en 1158, en Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Emma de Dinan, tenía 22 años. Se casó con William FitzPatrick aproximadamente 1184. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en agosto de 1233, en Dorking, Surrey, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en Mondaye, Calvados, Normandie, Francia.
